title: sir.policy_request.v0
description: The input sent to a policy_provider on stdin. All fields are populated by the Go orchestrator before evaluation. Policy providers (OPA, Cedar, custom packs) receive this and return sir.policy_verdict.v0.

op.description: Always 'evaluate' for policy requests. 'capabilities' is handled separately.

target.description: The target of the action: file path, remote name, URL, command, etc.

resolved_actor.description: Attribution of who initiated this action.

attribution_confidence.description: Confidence in the resolved_actor attribution, derived from signal reliability.

taint.description: Prior-session taint labels. Present when the session has seen sensitive data.

enforceability.description: What SIR can actually do with the verdict given available signals and providers.

mode.description: The active operating mode for this session.
